name: WinRAR Archive History
categoryDescription: Configuration and artifacts from third-party software — archive tools, cleanup utilities, development tools, and legacy applications.
description: WinRAR recently opened archives (ArcHistory), recently used archive names in save dialog (ArcName), and recently used extraction paths (ExtrPath).
forensic_value: ArcHistory proves specific archive files were opened. ExtrPath reveals extraction destinations — temp/desktop paths suggest manual extraction of malware. ArcName reveals what the user was archiving — data exfiltration staging uses WinRAR to create password-protected archives before transfer.
